scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @pap/storage-sqlite build && pnpm --filter @pap/ai-ollama build && pnpm --filter @pap/tools-search-searxng build && pnpm --filter @pap/tools-web build && pnpm --filter @pap/source-profiles build && pnpm --filter @pap/runtime build && pnpm --filter @pap/capability-echo build && pnpm --filter @pap/capability-local-model-test build && pnpm --filter @pap/capability-search-extract-test build && tsx src/index.ts
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @pap/storage-sqlite build && pnpm --filter @pap/ai-ollama build && pnpm --filter @pap/tools-search-searxng build && pnpm --filter @pap/tools-web build && pnpm --filter @pap/source-profiles build && pnpm --filter @pap/runtime build && pnpm --filter @pap/capability-echo build && pnpm --filter @pap/capability-local-model-test build && pnpm --filter @pap/capability-search-extract-test build && tsc -b tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @pap/storage-sqlite build && pnpm --filter @pap/ai-ollama build && pnpm --filter @pap/tools-search-searxng build && pnpm --filter @pap/tools-web build && pnpm --filter @pap/source-profiles build && pnpm --filter @pap/runtime build && pnpm --filter @pap/capability-echo build && pnpm --filter @pap/capability-local-model-test build && pnpm --filter @pap/capability-search-extract-test build && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json
